questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Susan: I think we have spent too much on unnecessary items. Peter: When we buy things we don’t need, we just end up creating more garbage and polluting the world for that matter. Susan: Let’s make some changes and not buy too much.
options: I couldn’t agree with you more!
It’s fantastic that you have done so!
Go all out and show your best!

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: George: Hey, your new cell phone looks cool! Edward: I bought it from an on-line shop. If you like it, I can place an order for you. George: No, thanks! I never do on-line shopping. Edward: Why not? It’s very convenient.
options: Could you find a similar one for me?
Could you lend it to me for a day?

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Vivian: I don’t know what to wear to the prom, Mom. Mom: Well, what about that newly bought purple blouse to go with that fancy white skirt? Vivian: I will definitely be laughed at in the party.
options: That will look awful on me.
You have a great taste, Mom.

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Clerk: This pair of high heels, along with the gown, will cost thirty thousand NT dollars. Do you want to pay in cash or on a credit card? Customer: Here you go. Clerk: A moment, please.... Here is your card, and please sign your name here.
options: Can I change to a larger size?

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Nina: How about having dinner together this weekend? Betty: I know a newly opened restaurant not far away. Nina: Can you guarantee that the food is good there? Betty: I’m not sure, but we can give it a try.
options: Can I take a rain check?

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Mother: You have been playing games all afternoon. Are you ready for the test tomorrow? Son: Give me 10 more minutes, and I’ll get back to my homework! Mother: When can you learn to arrange your time better and do the important things first? I will lock up your computer if you don’t stop right now! Son: Don’t do that., I don’t really like this game that much. I just hate preparing for my math test!

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: James: I’m having a sore throat, and I’m afraid I’m running a fever as well. Doc: Relax! We’ll take your temperature and have a check on your throat.... James: Is it serious? Doc: It’s just a common cold. Take a sick leave from school. Drink warm water and rest more, and you’ll recover soon.

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Student: What is a “proverb”? Teacher: The word means a short popular saying in which. Student: I see. So, “Heaven helps those who help themselves” is a proverb. Teacher: Sure, you’ve got the idea!
options: a good laugh can be aroused
one can get a romantic feeling

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Tourist: Excuse me, could you show me the way to Taipei 101? Man: Sure. Go straight for four blocks, and you’ll find it on your left hand side. Tourist: Do I need to take a bus? Man: It’s a 20-minute walking distance from here. You can either take a bus or walk there.
options: It’s too far to walk there.

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Lily: Did you do anything special during the four day holidays? Jean: Nope. I just stayed home and watched TV all day. What about you? Lily: Jean: No wonder you turn so dark!
options: I went to Hokkaido and enjoyed the cool weather there.
Just like you, I remained indoor all the time.
I went to Kenting, swimming and surfing all day.

I went to a different café each day, reading novels and enjoying the music. III. 綜合測驗 ( 第 22-31 題,每題 2 分,共 20 分 ) 說明:以下兩篇短文,共有 10 個空格,為第 22 至 31 題,每題有四個選項,請依各篇短文文意, 選出一個最適合該空格的答案。 ▲ 下篇短文共有 5 個空格,為第 22 至 26 題,請依短文文意,選出一個最適合該空格的答案。 The likelihood of fat children growing up to be fat adults is more than 50 percent, according to the experts, 22 called for parents to help their children keep a healthy weight. A popular folk saying 23 that fatness in children is not really fatness. However, the experts pointed out that the saying is not correct 24 studies have suggested that between 42 and 63 percent of fat children grow up to be fat adults. Furthermore, 25 of fat teenagers becoming fat adults is far higher — between 70 and 80 percent. 26, do prevent children and teenagers from getting fat!

questions.q: ng the six major cities, women in the other five major cities give birth to their first child at an average age of over ____, 28 women in Taipei give birth to their first child at an average of 32.

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: . ____, we might not have enough young people to support the elderly in the near future.
options: Nevertheless IV. 閱讀測驗 ( 第 32-41 題,每題 2 分,共 20 分 ) 說明:以下兩篇短文,共有 10 個題目,為第 32 至 41 題,請於閱讀短文後,選出最適當的答案 。 ▲ 閱讀下文,回答第 32-36 題。 This is the story of an insect army determined to rescue their queen from a car. They were a swarm of bees who, for two days, followed their queen bee trapped inside a car. The car belongs to a 68-year-old grandmother, who had no idea she’d picked up a tiny winged passenger when she visited a national park. Later, when she stopped to go shopping, the bees descended — thousands and thousands of them. Luckily, a local expert on bees dealt with the problem. The expert was driving by when he happened to see the swarm of bees on the car. He was worried someone might do something “stupid.” Bees are already dying from losing their homes and terrible farming practices, like the use of pesticide. The last thing you want is someone to pour boiling water on them to keep them away from the car. We didn’t know what happened to the queen bee, but we did know, to our relief, that all these bees were driven away from the car safe and sound. 32. What’s the passage mainly about? (A) It’s a story about an old lady who saved a swarm of bees. (B) It’s about how thousands of bees were saved by a bee expert. (C) It’s about how a queen bee ran away from an old lady who kept it in a car. (D) It’s a story about an insect army who successfully saved their queen bee. 33. Why were thousands of bees flying to the car driven by the old lady? (A) The old lady stole their beehive. (B) An expert caught their queen bee for an experiment. (C) An old lady accidentally kept their queen bee in her car. (D) They found the car a suitable place to live in.

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: What’s the passage mainly about?
options: It’s a story about an old lady who saved a swarm of bees.
It’s about how thousands of bees were saved by a bee expert.
It’s about how a queen bee ran away from an old lady who kept it in a car.
It’s a story about an insect army who successfully saved their queen bee.

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Why were thousands of bees flying to the car driven by the old lady?
options: The old lady stole their beehive.
An expert caught their queen bee for an experiment.
An old lady accidentally kept their queen bee in her car.
They found the car a suitable place to live in.

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: How did the expert find the bees?
options: The old lady called for help.
The police turned to him for the rescue.
He was in the car with the old lady.
He was passing by in his own car.

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Which of the following words is closest in meaning to the word “ swarm ”?

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Which of the following might be the “stupid” deed to drive bees away?
options: To free their queen bee and let all the bees follow their queen bee back home.
To find a way to catch all the bees and release them in a remote place with their queen.
To use pesticide and kill all the bees, including their queen.

To let experts on bees drive them away without doing any harm to them. ▲ 閱讀下文,回答第 37-41 題。 The native red squirrel of the UK is losing the battle with the gray squirrel, which was introduced from North America 140 years ago and has now spread across most of the UK. As a consequence, the gray squirrel is making the red squirrel an endangered species. However, biologists and other scientists are trying to turn the tide and victories have been heard here and there. For example, the Isle of Anglesey, a small island separated from the mainland Wales, is now completely free of gray squirrels after 18 years’ effort from scientists in different fields working together to get rid of them. The red squirrel’s living areas go from northern Europe to Asia, but it is especially loved in the UK. Prince Charles, for one, thinks it should be a national mascot. Perhaps its popularity is due to Beatrix Potter, who wrote a children’s book in 1903 called The Tale of Squirrel Nutkin. Or maybe the popularity is because of the memories of Tufty Fluffytail, a cartoon squirrel that for decades taught road safety to children. Whatever the reason, British people are fascinated with the creature. They have a real pride and passion for them and there’s a huge amount of excitement and determination to protect the red squirrel. Even with the fact that gray squirrels are one of the most invasive animals in the world, British people are determined to defeat them for the red squirrel!

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: What’s the best title for this passage?
options: A Miracle on a Small Island
A Good Memory of the British People
Environmental Protection: Never Too Late to Start
Red Squirrels: an Apple in the Eye of the British People

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: What does the word “ invasive ” mean in this passage?
options: Likely to be friendly and lovable.

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: In which of the following countries can we find red squirrels?

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: According to the passage, which of the following statements is correct?
options: Beatrix is the author of Harry Potter.
You can’t find any gray squirrels in the UK now.
Gray squirrels were brought to the UK less than one hundred years ago.
A cartoon squirrel used to teach road safety to children in the UK for decades.

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Which of the following descriptions about the Isle of Anglesey is correct?
options: It is located off the coast of Scotland.
Red squirrels live with gray squirrels peacefully there.

Scientists spent eighteen years there getting rid of gray squirrels totally. 第二部分:非選擇題 ( 第 I 至 III 題,每題 6 分,共 18 分 ) I. 填充 說明: ▲請依據中文提示,將試題內空格○ 1 、○ 2 答案之完整單字 ( 含提示之字首 ),分別作答於答 案卷之作答欄○ 1 、○ 2 之指定範圍內以完成句子。 ▲請勿抄題,每格限填一字,超過一字者視為錯誤,不予計分。
